features: The TYGA Foot File is an ideal solution for dry, calloused and cracked heels. With little effort, it gives you professional results in the comfort of your home.
Callus remover for feet: Get rid of tough calluses on your feet with this powerful callus remover. Amazing Quality.
Pedicure essential: This foot file is a must-have for achieving smooth and soft feet during pedicure sessions Go Smooth, Callus-Free.
Dead skin remover for feet: Say goodbye to rough and dry skin on your feet with this dead skin remover. It's time for smooth, soft skin.
Stainless Steel: 304 rust-proof - surgical grade - for a painless experience. Dead Skin Remover: Heal your heels, cracked skin and calluses.
